annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in MIPVU_METAPHOR_OR_UNCERTAIN_DECISIONS.

entailments: collective resolve or service is framed through body parts, soul, or embodied strength
National service is understood through embodied agency.
cmt.rival_reading: The phrase applies bodily or inner-life language to collective political commitment.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'wwi-embodied-national-service' marked 2 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.

entailments: wartime service or loss is framed as sacrifice for freedom, country, or allies
Wartime obligation is understood through sacrificial offering.
cmt.rival_reading: The passage concerns civic and military cost rather than a literal ritual offering.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'wwi-sacrifice-service' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.
